pr.title: MSE-optimal quant + GPTQ + sliding window eval (val_bpb 1.1909)

output.summary: Combines MSE-optimal per-row int8 quantization with GPTQ and sliding-window eval plus tuned seq_len/embedding LR tweaks.
techniques: MSE-optimal int8 quantization followed by Hessian-aware GPTQ rounding
Sliding-window evaluation (stride 64) to give each scored token >960 tokens of context
Longer seq_len with lower embed LR, Muon weight decay, and tighter logit softcap
